parameter.name: idmap_script
parameter.description: Path to an executable identity-mapping script run on every login. The first successful result is cached; later runs must match the cache or login is rejected. The script receives USERNAME, ACCESS_TOKEN, OBJECT_ID, TENANT_ID, and DOMAIN. ACCESS_TOKEN is empty when offline. Print one stdout line of comma-separated key=value pairs: .RS 4 .nf uid=<number> (mapped UID) gid=<number> (mapped GID) username=<string> (optional — overrides the session username) .fi .RE Only uid, gid, and username are accepted; any other key rejects the login. .PP Exit 0 with no output to use the default UID/GID mapping. A non-zero exit code rejects the login.
